summary: The board authorized management to contact Industry Participant to determine its interest in exploratory discussions concerning a merger or acquisition transaction.
type_fields: {"other_detail": "Board-initiated outreach to Industry Participant", "related_observation_id": null, "status_kind": "expressed_interest"}

summary: Industry Participant's CEO informed PetSmart's CEO that Industry Participant was not for sale and raised antitrust concerns about a combination.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "related_observation_id": null, "status_kind": "not_interested"}

summary: The board reviewed strategic and financial alternatives and established an ad hoc advisory subcommittee to oversee the review.
type_fields: {"other_detail": "Board formed ad hoc committee to review alternatives", "process_kind": "other", "process_scope": "target"}

summary: The Company retained J. P. Morgan as financial advisor to assist in the review of strategic alternatives.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "process_kind": "advisor_retention", "process_scope": "target"}

summary: JANA Partners filed a Schedule 13D disclosing 9.9% ownership and intent to engage in discussions regarding strategic alternatives, including a sale of the Company.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "related_observation_id": null, "status_kind": "expressed_interest"}

summary: Longview made public a letter to the board advocating a sale of the Company and indicating willingness to roll part or all of its holdings into equity of the acquiring entity.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "related_observation_id": null, "status_kind": "expressed_interest"}

summary: A representative of Industry Participant contacted J. P. Morgan indicating that Industry Participant might be interested in re-visiting combination discussions if the Company were to pursue strategic alternatives.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "related_observation_id": null, "status_kind": "expressed_interest"}

summary: The board determined to explore strategic alternatives including a possible sale, authorized the ad hoc committee to oversee the sale exploration process, and decided J. P. Morgan should contact likely interested parties in late September or early October.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "process_kind": "sale_launch", "process_scope": "target"}

date_raw_text: the middle of August through the end of October
subject_names: 27 potential participants in a sale process contacted by J. P. Morgan
summary: J. P. Morgan was contacted by 27 potential participants in a sale process, including three strategic parties (not counting Industry Participant) and 24 financial participants.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "related_observation_id": null, "status_kind": "expressed_interest"}

summary: The Company issued a press release announcing that it determined to explore strategic alternatives for the Company to maximize value for stockholders, including a possible sale.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "process_kind": "press_release", "process_scope": "target"}

summary: J. P. Morgan informed Industry Participant that it would not be invited into the exploratory process due to antitrust concerns.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "related_observation_id": null, "status_kind": "excluded"}

counterparty_names: 15 potentially interested financial buyers that entered into confidentiality and standstill agreements
summary: The Company entered into confidentiality and standstill agreements with 15 potentially interested financial buyers, all of which engaged in due diligence and received management presentations during October.
